docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY DEAN, ALEX AS TO DEFENDANT DEGRAFF, DENISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DEGRAFF, DENISE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2014 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-09-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CASE SETTLED BETWEEN PARTIES. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY DAVID DEGRAFF--HER BROTHER. DAVID DEGRAFF WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON THE PROGRESS REPORT OF 3/24/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY HER BROTHER--DAVID DEGROFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
